label: Customer.io
description: Send lifecycle messages and track customer events via Customer.io's Track and App APIs.

form.title: Connect Customer.io
form.subtitle: Paste your Track and App API credentials to send messages and track events.

methods.label: Track API Key
methods.description: Paste your Track Site ID and Track API Key from your Customer.io workspace. Quickest way to start sending events and identifying customers.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with Track API Key

The Track API is the primary way to identify users and send events to Customer.io.

### Steps

1. Log in to [Customer.io](https://fly.customer.io) and open your workspace.
2. Go to **Settings → API Credentials** (or **Account Settings → Track API**).
3. Copy your **Site ID** and **Track API Key** from the "Track API" section.
4. Paste both values into the fields below.
5. Select your data **Region** — choose **EU** if your workspace is in the EU data center, otherwise leave it as **US**.

### Notes

- Your Site ID and Track API Key are workspace-specific. If you have multiple workspaces, make sure you're copying from the right one.
- The Track API Key is shown in plain text in the dashboard — regenerate it from the same page if you suspect exposure.
- If you also want to manage campaigns, segments, or send transactional messages programmatically, add an **App API Key** in the optional field below.

fields.name: site_id
fields.label: Site ID
fields.description: Found in Customer.io under Settings → API Credentials → Track API.

fields.name: track_api_key
fields.label: Track API Key
fields.description: Paired with your Site ID. Found in the same Track API section of your credentials page.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Data Center Region
fields.description: Select the region where your Customer.io workspace data is hosted.

fields.name: app_api_key
fields.label: App API Key (optional)
fields.description: Optional. Enables access to the App API for managing campaigns, segments, and sending transactional messages. Found under Settings → API Credentials → App API.

methods.label: App API Key Only
methods.description: Use a Customer.io App API Key for managing campaigns, segments, and transactional messages without Track event ingestion.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with App API Key

Use this method if you only need access to Customer.io's App API — for example, to trigger broadcasts, manage segments, or send transactional emails without piping raw tracking events.

### Steps

1. Log in to [Customer.io](https://fly.customer.io) and open your workspace.
2. Go to **Settings → API Credentials**.
3. Under the **App API** section, click **Create App API Key** if you don't have one yet.
4. Copy the generated key — it may only be shown once, so save it somewhere safe.
5. Paste it into the **App API Key** field below.
6. Select your data **Region** — choose **EU** if your workspace is in the EU data center.

### Notes

- The App API Key does not allow you to track events or identify customers. Use the **Track API Key** method if you need that capability.
- You can scope App API Keys to specific permissions in the Customer.io dashboard — grant only what Anton needs.
- Regenerate the key from the same credentials page if it is ever compromised.

fields.name: app_api_key
fields.label: App API Key
fields.description: Found in Customer.io under Settings → API Credentials → App API. May only be shown once — copy it immediately.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Data Center Region
fields.description: Select the region where your Customer.io workspace data is hosted.
